text: バルカンの勇姿を僕に！

Bonsoir, mon ami! Are my beloved
babies growing up strong? No doubt
you are doting on each and every one
of them, but I would love to see how
much they’ve grown. Can I watch you
and Vulcan fight alongside each other
via monitor?

Defeat a level 61 enemy
by attacking it with Vulcan
